name: stack-sovereignty
description: Optevo Claw — Stack Sovereignty course marketplace. Owned-stack capability for non-technical operators running their own VPS, one accreted skill per week.

plugins.name: vps-architect
plugins.description: The Stack Sovereignty class plugin — 'your primitives, packaged.' Gives the agent on your VPS the curated infrastructure landscape (what you can run and what it replaces), plus the operational skills it needs to set up and run your box: hand you a clear task when it's blocked, and interview you so everything it does is tuned to you. Grows one skill per course week.

plugins.name: equip
plugins.description: Equip a project folder for the work ahead — reuse before build. Interviews you about the task, confirms where the project lives (existing folder or scaffolded from scratch), recommends how heavy the process should be (planf3, grilling, wayfinder, superpowers, BMAD — or just go), inventories what's already available at project and global level, searches the ecosystem for well-regarded existing skills, and only authors what's genuinely missing. Everything lands at project level unless you say otherwise.
